appraisal_events.evidence: « Robert de Saint-Loup souffrit horriblement de cette brouille… » ; « …le silence [de sa maîtresse] finit par affoler sa douleur… » ; « une de leurs conséquences serait d'empêcher Robert de Saint-Loup de me mener de longtemps chez sa tante. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator presents Robert overwhelmed by a lovers' quarrel, prey to anxieties and impotent speculations, with a practical consequence that socially paralyzes him (delays the visit to his aunt).

status_effects.explanation: Locally, Robert is shown in distress and off balance, dominated by worry and imagination, which marks a clear decline in his emotional position.
